labels.name: reactant ∇

title: Reinvoke sharding tests and refactor Clock constructor for sharded grids

body:
## Summary
- Adds 4D (quadrilinear) and 5D (quintilinear) interpolation support to `TabulatedFunction`, extending the existing 1D/2D/3D pattern
- New `_interpolate` methods for 4D (16-term) and 5D (32-term) data, building on trilinear basis functions
- Includes kernels, builders, evaluation methods, type aliases (`TabulatedFunction4D`, `TabulatedFunction5D`), and comprehensive tests
- Dispatch disambiguation: 4D/5D `_interpolate` uses `Tuple{Any,Any,Any}` type constraints to avoid conflict with the existing 3D vararg method used by `FieldTimeSeries`

## Test plan
- [x] All 3930 tests pass locally (`test/test_utils.jl`)
- [ ] CI passes

cc @kaiyuan-cheng

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Extend TabulatedFunction to support 4D and 5D interpolation
